content.full_text:
Judge Gordon Cologne 
Dale and Lloyd 
Technical Auiatanc. 
(916) 322·5662 
9404 Genesee Ave., Suite 300 
La Jolla, 
CA 
92037 
Dear Judge Cologne: 
Ad ... lnistratian 
•• 
Executive/legal 
322-5660 
322·5901 
August 16, 1985 
Enforce .... nt 
322-6441 
Re: FPPC Advice No. A-8S-181 
This is to confirm our telephone conversation regarding your 
status as a state employee. 
You indicated that you are under 
contract with the State of California to provide consulting 
services to the Governor's office. 
Specifically, you have worked 
on the development and revision of the the Governor's toxic waste 
plan, and will present the plan to the Legislature for its 
consideration. 
Your involvement in this project includes 
independent decision making. 
You have asked whether you must register as a lobbyist because 
of the activity you will engage in with regard to presenting the 
plan to the Legislature. 
Gov. Code Section 86300 exempts from the lobbying provisions 
of the Act: 
••• any employee of the State of California acting 
within the scope of his employment; provided that, 
an employee of the State of California, other than a 
legislative official, who attempts to influence 
legislative action and who would be required to 
register as a lobbyist.except for the provisions of 
this subdivision shall not make gifts of more than 
ten dollars ($10) in a calendar month to an elected 
state officer or legislative official. 
Therefore, you are not required to register as a lobbyist by 
virtue of your activities in connection with the Governor's toxic 
waste plan. 
However, as a state employee who engages in decision making, 
you are required to file a Statement of Economic Interests pursuant 
to Chapter 7 of the Political Reform Act. 


Judge Cologne 
August 16, 1985 
Page 2 
Your position as a consultant is designated in the Conflict of 
Interest Code of the Governor's Office. 
Your statement of Economic 
Interests (Form 730) should be filed with the filing officer for 
the Governorrs Office. 
Thank you for your inquiry. 
Please call me if you have any 
questions. 
JP:kt 
cc: 
Vance Raye 
Governor's Office 
v~ 
Sincerely, 
Jeanne Pritchard 
Technical Assistance and Analysis
